projectDescription: A collection of free, browser-based utilities including a PDF-to-CSV converter, word counter, JSON formatter, URL parser, circular image cropper, and LinkedIn text formatter.
keyFeatures: PDF to CSV conversion (Standard free tier + AI-powered for scanned PDFs)
Word counter with character, sentence, paragraph, and reading-time stats
JSON formatter, validator, and minifier with real-time error detection
URL parser that breaks any URL into all its components
Circular image cropper with transparent PNG output, fully client-side
LinkedIn text formatter using Unicode for bold, italic, underline, and more
No sign-up required for most tools
Privacy-first: files and text are never stored or shared
publicApiSurface: PDF to CSV: POST /api/pdf-to-csv (Standard mode via pdfplumber, AI mode via NewTools AI)
All other tools run entirely client-side in the browser (no server API)
